title: Agent Board Project Config
description: Per-project configuration for Agent Board. Place this file at .agent-board/config.json in the workspace root. All VS Code settings can be overridden here.

github.description: GitHub integration settings for this project.

enabled.description: Whether the GitHub provider is enabled for this project.

onlyAssignedToMe.description: Only fetch issues assigned to the current user.

enabled.description: Whether the JSON provider is enabled for this project.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the JSON tasks file. Default: .agent-board/tasks

markdownProvider.description: Markdown task provider settings. Each .md file in the inbox directory becomes a task (filename = title, content = body). Done tasks are moved to a separate directory.

enabled.description: Whether the Markdown provider is enabled for this project. Disabled by default.

inboxPath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the inbox directory containing .md task files. Default: .agent-board/markdown/inbox

donePath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the directory where done .md files are moved. Default: .agent-board/markdown/done

enabled.description: Whether the Beads provider is enabled for this project.

executable.description: Path to the Beads CLI executable.

onlyAssignedToMe.description: Only fetch items assigned to the current user.

azureDevOps.description: Azure DevOps work items provider settings. Requires Azure CLI with azure-devops extension.

enabled.description: Whether the Azure DevOps provider is enabled for this project. Disabled by default.

organization.description: Azure DevOps organization URL or name (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/my-org).

onlyAssignedToMe.description: Only fetch work items assigned to the current user.

worktree.description: Git worktree settings. When enabled, providers that support worktree will create an isolated worktree for each task.

enabled.description: Whether to create a git worktree for providers that support it. Default: true.

genAiProviders.description: Per-provider GenAI configuration. Global providers (chat, cloud, copilot-cli) can be overridden here. Project providers (ollama, mistral) are enabled and configured only here.

model.description: Model name to use with this provider.

endpoint.description: API endpoint URL for this provider.

yolo.description: Enable /yolo mode — auto-approve all changes without confirmation (copilot-cli only).

fleet.description: Enable /fleet mode — optimise prompt for parallel fleet execution (copilot-cli only).

columns.description: Ordered list of Kanban column identifiers.

maxSessions.description: Maximum number of parallel agent sessions launched by the squad feature.

sourceColumn.description: Column from which the squad picks tasks to launch. Default: todo.

activeColumn.description: Column tasks are moved to when the agent starts working. Default: inprogress.

doneColumn.description: Column tasks are moved to when the agent completes. Default: review.

autoSquadInterval.description: Auto-squad polling interval in milliseconds. Default: 15000.

maxRetries.description: Maximum retries for a failed squad session. Default: 0 (no retry).

sessionTimeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a session may run before being timed out. Default: 300000 (5 min). Set to 0 to disable.

cooldownMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between consecutive session launches. Prevents rate-limiting. Default: 0 (no cooldown).

notifications.description: VS Code notification settings for automatic task state changes.

taskActive.description: Show a notification when a task is automatically moved to the active column.

taskDone.description: Show a notification when a task is automatically moved to the done column.

mcp.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server settings. When enabled, Agent Board exposes a stdio-based MCP server that lets external agents list, read, and update tasks.

enabled.description: Whether the MCP server is enabled. Default: false.

tasksPath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the JSON task file the MCP server operates on. Defaults to the jsonProvider path.

pollInterval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for providers that use polling.

logLevel.description: Log level for the Agent Board output channel.
